mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate declines are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced household income growth, triggering negative equity returns as earnings expectations are downgraded.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns occur in more than 55% of triggered instances over a 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of recovery-phase observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid month-over-month growth in industrial production during economic recovery phases signals supply chain normalization and capacity utilization improvements, driving short-term positive market momentum.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth exceeding 1% month-over-month yields negative 5-day returns in more than 50% of recovery-phase observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation erodes real corporate profit margins and prompts market expectations of tighter financial conditions, resulting in negative forward equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes exceeding 0.5% month-over-month are followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 65% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where total nonfarm payrolls increase while the unemployment rate declines confirms broad-based labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS increase combined with UNRATE decline signal yields negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion that supports corporate revenue growth and earnings revisions, generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive GDP growth quarters are followed by negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of cases over a rolling 10-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth outpacing retail sales growth during late-cycle expansions signals inventory accumulation and weakening demand absorption, leading to negative equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth exceeding RSAFS growth yields positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of late-cycle observations.
